examples_zh: 查询明天上海虹桥到南京南的高铁时刻和二等座余票。
帮我查广州南到长沙南今天下午 3 点后的列车和余票情况。
查询北京西站和北京南站的站点信息，并确认去郑州东的车次从哪个站发车。
examples_en: Check tomorrow's high-speed train schedules and second-class seat availability from Shanghai Hongqiao to Nanjing South.
Find trains from Guangzhou South to Changsha South after 3 PM today and show remaining tickets.
Look up station information for Beijing West and Beijing South, then identify which station has trains to Zhengzhou East.
